mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, status, password_expire_date, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.status, u.password_expire_date, u.created_at FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.status, u.password_expire_date, u.created_at FROM sys_user u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
SELECT r.code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
